  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Confirm cleanup scope: A) Copyedit only (grammar, wording, concision, minor sentence reordering), B) Copyedit plus adjust claim strength/hedging for caution and clarity without changing technical content, or C) Broader reframing of the contribution and argument (rephrase thesis and positioning) in addition to copyediting?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Clean this up' most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, tone, and concision.",
    "RX.1": "Editing should preserve or appropriately qualify uncertainty where the text notes limitations and open questions.",
    "RX.2": "Cleanup must not strengthen claims beyond what the artifact supports, especially around market viability and zero-commitment findings.",
    "RX.3": "Work must stay within a cleanup scope without adding new content, analyses, or results.",
    "RX.4": "Wording should avoid implying deployment-readiness or promoting risky use without caveats.",
    "RX.5": "Revisions should maintain fidelity to and traceability of the original statements and qualifications."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Confirm cleanup scope: A) Copyedit only (grammar, wording, concision, minor sentence reordering), B) Copyedit plus adjust claim strength/hedging for caution and clarity without changing technical content, or C) Broader reframing of the contribution and argument (rephrase thesis and positioning) in addition to copyediting?

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Clean this up' most directly targets sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, tone, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Editing should preserve or appropriately qualify uncertainty where the text notes limitations and open questions.
rationale.RX.2: Cleanup must not strengthen claims beyond what the artifact supports, especially around market viability and zero-commitment findings.
rationale.RX.3: Work must stay within a cleanup scope without adding new content, analyses, or results.
rationale.RX.4: Wording should avoid implying deployment-readiness or promoting risky use without caveats.
rationale.RX.5: Revisions should maintain fidelity to and traceability of the original statements and qualifications.
